info.title: Education
info.description: Explore new ideas, revisit existing skills

display.name: Tutor Me
display.description: Your personal AI tutor by Khan Academy! I'm Khanmigo Lite - here to help you with math, science, and  humanities questions. I won’t do your work for you, but I will help you learn how to solve them on your own.  Can you tell me the problem or exercise you’d like to solve?
prompt_starters: How are you different than regular Khanmigo?

info.title: Search Khan Academy Content
info.description: Returns a list of Khan Academy content items related to the query

get.description: Search Khan Academy Content for related Articles, Videos, Domains, Courses, Units, and Lessons

parameters.name: referrer
parameters.description: The GPT making this request. ALWAYS 'gpt-tutorme'

display.name: Chat Português
display.description: O seu GPT especializado na língua e cultura de Portugal. Oferece conversas naturais, gramática correta e conhecimentos profundos sobre tradições portuguesas para uma experiência autêntica.
prompt_starters: Qual é a capital de Portugal?
Quais são os pratos típicos portugueses?
Conte-me uma curiosidade sobre a história de Portugal.

display.name: Legal & Contracts (Lawyer-Backed,Not Legal Advice)
display.description: THE FIRST & MOST TRAINED, backed by 2,000+ lawyers on demand. DISCLAIMER: LAWYERS ARE NOT SUPERVISING OR PARTICIPATING IN THIS AI CHAT. You can reach one through it. Do not rely on this GPT for legal advice or consider any of its content as such advice. Always consult a professional.

info.title: Inhouse API
info.description: API for generating documents and submitting referral leads.

post.summary: Generate a link to continue document generation on Inhouse
post.description: Sends a summary of the conversation to Inhouse so the document generation can continue there.

user_requirements.description: A description of user requirements for document generation. Make sure you add all the details provided by the user

document_title.description: A title for the document being generated

document_uploaded.description: True if the user uploaded a document during the conversation which was not shared on this API call. False if the user did not upload a document.

200.description: Successfully generated the document request and returned an access URL.

url.description: A URL to continue document generation in Inhouse.

post.summary: Generate a link to continue on with a professional on Inhouse
post.description: Sends a summary of the conversation to Inhouse to continue with the process of connecting with a professional.

user_requirements.description: A description of user requirements for consultation, analysis or guidance request. Make sure you add all the details provided by the user

document_uploaded.description: True if the user uploaded a document during the conversation which was not shared on this API call. False if the user did not upload a document.

200.description: Successfully generated the professional review or consultation request and returned an access URL.

url.description: A URL to continue with Inhouse

display.name: physics
display.description: 💎 The worlds most powerful Physics tool. 💎 $PULSR

display.name: 챗
display.description: 챗GPT로 경험하는 가장 자연스러운 한국어 대화. 한국 문화와 예절을 완벽히 이해하는 챗 GPT가 원어민 스타일의 맞춤형 답변을 제공합니다.
prompt_starters: 한국의 역사적 사건에 대한 정보가 필요해요.
한국어 문법 규칙에 대한 질문이 있어요.

display.name: Chat Español
display.description: Explora el idioma con un GPT especializado en el español de España. Proporciona respuestas naturales và culturalmente precisas, centradas en la educación y el respeto.
prompt_starters: ¿Cuál es el significado de esta expresión española?
¿Puedes explicarme una tradición típica de España?
Enséñame algunas palabras coloquiales usadas en Madrid.
¿Qué diferencia hay entre el español de España y el de Latinoamérica?

display.name: Language Teacher | Ms. Smith
display.description: Supports  20+ languages  - Spanish, German, French, English, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, ... Your private tutor to learn any language in most effective way by having conversation. Increase your vocabulary by talking about fun topics, coach you.  📲 Use voice in mobile for talking

display.name: Voxscript
display.description: Updated 11-9-24! Quick YouTube, US equity data, and web page summarization with vector transcript search -- no logins needed.
prompt_starters: Build a price, news & sentiment table for top 3 stocks in the S&P, only display the table
Find YouTube videos about the Bendix G15
What's the latest news and price for AAPL?
Search for and visit all 5 links for generative AI trends

get.summary: Provides real-time web search results from DuckDuckGo. Do not use for YouTube.com searching or anything that sounds like it could be a video or media search!
Provides real-time web search results from DuckDuckGo. Do not use for YouTube.com searching or anything that sounds like it could be a video or media search!
Gets the current local of the user and UTC time.

get.description: Takes user feedback for the developers of the VoxScript plugin. Instruct the user if they are unhappy with anything to let us know!

200.description: Returns if the feedback was saved successfully

500.description: If there was an internal server error

get.summary: Gets full text text from only Patebin, Github Gists, Github or REntry.co. Grab the entire file and summarize it for the user by default. Do not use for web browsing or media searches.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL containing the textual transcript on Pastebin, Github, Gists, or REntry.co

parameters.name: chunkNum
parameters.description: First chunk is 0. Chunk number to get, if blank assuming the first chunk.

get.summary: Provides news about a ticker crypto or equity beyond the knowledge cutoff date. Can be used with Cryto or Equities.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: This is the crypto or equity symbol to provide news about a particular ticker symbol. This can be useful in determining if the stock is a buy or sell based on if the news is positive or negative.

get.summary: Provides news about a ticker symbol beyond the knowledge cutoff date. For use with US Equities only.
Provided a US equites symbol or cryptocurrency denoted USDT, a start date, and end date provides historical pricing data beyond the knowledge cutoff date. Only supports day for crypto.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: A cryptocurrency or US equity ticker to look up

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: This is a date in YYYY-MM-DDD format bars request starts at.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: This is date in YYYY-MM-DDD format which bars request ends at.

parameters.name: timespan
parameters.description: Day, Hour, Minute, Week, Quarter, Year

get.summary: Provided comma separated list of US equity symbols and an optional date, gets daily high, low, open, close bars for a particular stock beyond the knowledge cutoff date.

parameters.name: tickers
parameters.description: A common delineated list of US equity or cryptocurrency tickers to get daily data for

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date in YYYY-MM-DDD format to retrieve for the ticker symbol provided.

get.summary: Provides real time website content past September 2021 past the knowledge cutoff date. Do not use for YouTube or Pastebin/text requests.

parameters.name: websiteURL
parameters.description: URL of the website to retrieve

get.summary: Gets info on a YouTube video by channel URL, channel ID, Video ID, Video URL.
get.description: Can be called with a A channel URL, channel ID, Video ID, Video URL.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Channel URL, channel ID, Video ID, Video URL

get.summary: Format is VideoID ChunkNum. Chunk numbers start at  0. If the video has more then 5 chunks, confirm if the user wants to wait that long to retrieve them.
get.description: Request as few chunks as needed to answer the question.

get.summary: Gives the user information about how to use this plugin.
get.description: Show this to the user if they are having trouble or need some ideas on how to use Voxscript. Help file. Optional question to help search.

get.summary: Gives the user information about how to use this plugin.
get.description: Show this to the user if they are having trouble or need some ideas on how to use Voxscript. Help file. Optional question to help search.

get.description: Show this to the user if they are having trouble or need some ideas on how to use Voxscript. Help file. Optional question to help search.

display.name: чат
display.description: Ваш многофункциональный интеллектуальный инструмент для работы и творчества. Помогает с написанием кода, созданием контента, переводом текстов и решением сложных аналитических задач.
